entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH THIS EVENING
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 10 MPH, INCREASING TO 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
BREEZY WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 50S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 30S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 40
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
